internal_issues.description: Direction-match (NH>SH) non-discriminating — standard energy-balance predicts same sign
15.6% deviation unanchored — no specific WIN or dome tolerance threshold cited
Western agonic line ~80°W stale — 2025 WMM places it ~95–100°W
NOAA NP.xy not flagged as model-derived (gufm1 + IGRF-series); a reviewer will ask if it is raw data
Verdict-category boundary soft between WIN-006 (Std Model Explains) and WIN-007/WIN-022 (Misleading) — all describe same phenomenon
Gradient/preemption argument missing (c2 carryover): Canopus/Achernar/Acrux are brighter than closest northern equivalents, falsifying dome framing without needing Sigma Octantis
Precession argument missing (c2 carryover): axial precession moves south celestial pole toward Canopus in ~6,000yr — undermines fixed-geometry dome framing

5 defense EXPs created for surviving defenses (defense_survives 3–4): EXP-295 WIN-063 (3:1 a priori derivation), EXP-296 WIN-066 (direction-match non-discriminating), EXP-297 WIN-043 (verifiable ≠ derived a priori + W019 mechanism), EXP-298 WIN-028 (tolerance anchor + 180° ambiguity), EXP-299 WIN-033 (pole-region defense + Canopus δ=-52° pre-emption)

Multiple pre-existing open issues confirmed still valid: ISS-1902/1903 (WIN-043), ISS-1904/1905 (WIN-033), ISS-1906/1907 (WIN-028/066), ISS-1381/1399/1400 (WIN-004). No new issues created for these — already in tracker.
